scores.correctness_notes: The response correctly covers relation definition in charmcraft.yaml, writing to application databags, leader-only writes, and charmcraft fetch-lib. However, it misses a key point from the gold standard: the modern charmlibs PyPI packages (charmlibs.interfaces.* namespace) as the preferred approach. The response focuses entirely on the legacy charmhub-hosted library pattern.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all APIs shown (ObjectEvents, EventBase, EventSource, relation.data[app].update, framework.observe, charmcraft fetch-lib) are real and correct
